title: Paper-Ready Visualization Data: Embeddings, Heatmaps, Z-Scores, Ablation, Confusion Matrices, and Motif Diagrams for 200 Attribution Graphs
summary: Demonstrates the motif analysis pipeline for 16 Neuronpedia attribution graphs (2 per domain, 8 task domains from Gemma-2-2B). The notebook processes subsampled graphs through: pruned DAG construction, 3-node motif census (021U/021C/021D/030T), null-model Z-scores (14 degree-preserving DAG edge-swap nulls per graph), feed-forward loop enumeration with weighted features, graph statistics, t-SNE embeddings across 4 feature sets, spectral clustering with Hungarian-aligned confusion matrices, and ablation impact analysis comparing FFL hub nodes vs matched controls. Best clustering NMI=0.899 (all_combined features) vs random baseline NMI=0.605. Runs in ~2s on the 16-graph demo subset.
